# Acme Threat Report — Operation Test-G-4

Threat researchers observed a new spear-phishing campaign attributed to
TestActorAlpha. The campaign delivered malware that beaconed to the
command-and-control endpoint at evil.example.com, hosted on 192.0.2.10.

The dropper's SHA-256 was
abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789 and
exploited CVE-2026-12345 to elevate privileges. Analysts noted the
operators reused infrastructure observed during earlier intrusions and
recommended monitoring the listed indicators in SIEM telemetry.
